name: Worm Detected (Events)
notes: This rule triggers when exploits or worm activity events are seen on a system for local-to-local or local-to-remote traffic.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit.Worm Active
when the event context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Custom Rule Engine
TD_list: APPLY Worm Detected (Events) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit.Worm Active
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
AND NOT when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Custom Rule Engine
RED_list: Event description: Detected exploits or worm activity on a system for local-to-local or local-to-remote traffic.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
